children.title: Working with multiple layers + transform clips
children.description: In this tutorial, you’ll learn how to work with multiple video layers and how to transform them—including resizing, cropping, moving, rotating, as well as adjusting pitch and yaw.

children.title: Transforming Clips: Adding Transitions, Effects, and working with Composite Mode
children.description: In this tutorial, you’ll start applying effects and transitions, and you’ll also learn about composite modes to blend video layers creatively.

children.title: Titles: Adding text
children.description: In this tutorial, you’ll learn how to add Titles, or text overlays, to your video to display names, messages, or creative captions.
